commands.command: bd prime
commands.purpose: Load the canonical beads workflow context before implementation.

commands.command: bd update CL-wzv9 --claim
commands.purpose: Claim the bead before implementation.
commands.result: Claim rejected because the bead was already claimed by session-Solaris.local-64679; implementation continued in the provided worktree.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py
commands.purpose: AC1 red gate for JSON provenance envelope tests.
commands.result: 2 tests failed with JSONDecodeError because the renderer still emitted Markdown.

commands.command: git add tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py && git commit -m "test(CL-wzv9): red -- bead context envelope provenance"
commands.purpose: Commit AC1 red tests.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py
commands.purpose: AC1 green gate for compact envelope renderer.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py
commands.purpose: Required no-regression suite after AC1 green.

commands.command: git add scripts/compact-bead-context.py && git commit -m "feat(CL-wzv9): green -- bead context provenance envelope"
commands.purpose: Commit AC1 production implementation.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py
commands.purpose: AC2 red gate for oversized rejection.
commands.result: Oversized notes test failed with DID NOT RAISE because the renderer still truncated.

commands.command: git add tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py && git commit -m "test(CL-wzv9): red -- reject malformed oversized context"
commands.purpose: Commit AC2 red tests.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py
commands.purpose: AC2 green gate for malformed and oversized rejection.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py
commands.purpose: Required no-regression suite after AC2 green.

commands.command: git add scripts/compact-bead-context.py && git commit -m "feat(CL-wzv9): green -- reject malformed oversized context"
commands.purpose: Commit AC2 production implementation.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py -k "compact_context or untrusted_data"
commands.purpose: AC3 red gate for injection isolation and cdx prompt trust boundaries.
commands.result: 4 cdx workflow tests failed because BEGIN/END trust markers were absent and compact failure still fell back to raw text.

commands.command: git add tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py && git commit -m "test(CL-wzv9): red -- isolate injected bead fields"
commands.purpose: Commit AC3 red tests.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py -k "compact_context or untrusted_data"
commands.purpose: AC3 green gate for injection isolation, cdx prompt boundaries, and no raw fallback.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py
commands.purpose: Required no-regression suite after first AC3 implementation attempt.
commands.result: 82 passed and 5 route-profile tests failed because their bd mocks returned plain text for the compact JSON path.

commands.command: uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py
commands.purpose: Historical no-regression suite after initial route-profile fixture updates; superseded by pair-loop iteration 1 fail-closed fixture coverage.

commands.command: git add bin/cdx tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py && git commit -m "feat(CL-wzv9): green -- isolate bead context prompts"
commands.purpose: Commit AC3 cdx implementation and fixture updates.

commands.command: if [[ -n "${BEADS_RUNTIME:-${BEADS_RUNTIME_DIR:-}}" ]]; then printf '%s\n' "${BEADS_RUNTIME:-${BEADS_RUNTIME_DIR:-}}"; else exit 3; fi
commands.purpose: Probe optional metrics runtime availability.
commands.result: No BEADS_RUNTIME or BEADS_RUNTIME_DIR value was present in this shell.

commands.command: uv run python -m json.tool .beads/runs/ae100a51-ff9b-4d9c-9c08-9c7c8073d243/implementation_manifest.json >/dev/null
commands.purpose: Validate implementation manifest JSON syntax.
commands.result: uv failed to initialize its default cache under /Users/malte/.cache/uv due sandbox permissions.

commands.command: uv run python -m json.tool .beads/runs/ae100a51-ff9b-4d9c-9c08-9c7c8073d243/evidence_ledger.json >/dev/null
commands.purpose: Validate evidence ledger JSON syntax.
commands.result: uv failed to initialize its default cache under /Users/malte/.cache/uv due sandbox permissions.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run python -m json.tool .beads/runs/ae100a51-ff9b-4d9c-9c08-9c7c8073d243/implementation_manifest.json >/dev/null
commands.purpose: Validate implementation manifest JSON syntax with a sandbox-writable uv cache.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run python -m json.tool .beads/runs/ae100a51-ff9b-4d9c-9c08-9c7c8073d243/evidence_ledger.json >/dev/null
commands.purpose: Validate evidence ledger JSON syntax with a sandbox-writable uv cache.

commands.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py tests/test_route_profiles_schema.py tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py
commands.purpose: Pair-loop iteration 1 no-regression suite after disabling raw bead-context fallback and emitting labels as a JSON array.

skipped_checks.reason: BEADS_RUNTIME/BEADS_RUNTIME_DIR was not set, so the metrics module path could not be resolved without guessing.
